warnings: Performance warnings for bundle size (expected, not blocking)

syncStatus.notes: TSX and PHP structure remain synced after fixes. Section wrapper, container, heading, and search-inner all match. Load More button ARIA attributes added only to PHP (TSX uses FilteredServerSideRender for preview). Progress bar CSS custom property implementation verified in both PHP and CSS.

testPage.notes: Existing test page unchanged - fixes applied to block template and styles only

fixesApplied.description: Missing @var docblock in PHP template for camelCase attribute variables
fixesApplied.fix: Added @var docblock after opening comment with all camelCase attribute variables annotated
fixesApplied.verification: Prevents PHP_CodeSniffer warnings for camelCase variables. No functional change.

fixesApplied.description: Load More button missing initial aria-disabled and aria-busy attributes in PHP template
fixesApplied.fix: Added aria-disabled='false' and aria-busy='false' to Load More button initial markup
fixesApplied.verification: Initial ARIA state now present in markup. JavaScript updates these dynamically (Search.js lines 243-244) when button is clicked. Improves accessibility baseline.

fixesApplied.description: Progress bar below pagination uses inline styles instead of CSS custom properties
fixesApplied.fix: Replaced inline width and background styles with CSS custom property --progress, moved gradient to CSS file
changes: PHP line 251: Changed from 'style="width: X%; background: linear-gradient(...)"' to 'style="--progress: X"'
CSS file: Added rule '.search-pagination-progress > div' with width: calc(var(--progress, 0) * 1%) and background gradient

alsoUpdated.change: Added CSS rule for pagination progress bar using --progress custom property

fixesApplied.verification: More semantic implementation. Progress percentage now set via CSS variable, styling defined in CSS file. Functionally equivalent to inline styles.

implementationNotes.docblock: PHP docblock now documents all camelCase attribute variables to prevent PHP_CodeSniffer warnings while maintaining WordPress auto-extraction pattern.
implementationNotes.ariaAttributes: Load More button now has complete initial ARIA state (aria-disabled='false', aria-busy='false'). JavaScript updates these to 'true' during loading (Search.js).
implementationNotes.progressBar: Pagination progress bar now uses CSS custom property --progress for width calculation. Gradient definition moved from inline style to Search.css. Maintains visual appearance while improving code organization.
implementationNotes.tsxPhpSync: TSX uses FilteredServerSideRender for preview, so Load More button ARIA attributes not needed in TSX. PHP renders actual frontend markup with complete ARIA state. Progress bar styling now split between PHP (sets --progress value) and CSS (applies styling).
implementationNotes.noRegressions: All fixes are additive or refactoring. No removal of existing functionality. Build passes, test page unchanged.

verificationSteps: Build compiled successfully with no errors (performance warnings only)
TSX/PHP structure sync verified - section wrapper, container, heading, search-inner all match
Load More button ARIA attributes verified in PHP template
Progress bar CSS custom property verified in both PHP (sets value) and CSS (applies styling)
No functional changes to block behavior - all fixes are code quality improvements
